⚠️ **This type is _unstable_ and may change significantly in a way that the data won't be backwards compatible.**
Color selection for a [`archetypes.Trail3D`](https://rerun.io/docs/reference/types/archetypes/trail3d).

## Fields
#### `mode`
Type: non-null `UInt8`

Color mode. 1 means solid, 2 means magnitude colormap.

#### `color`
Type: non-null `UInt32`

Solid color used when mode is solid, packed as 0xRRGGBBAA.

#### `colormap`
Type: non-null `UInt8`

Colormap integer used when mode is magnitude.


## Arrow datatype
```
Struct(
    "mode": non-null UInt8
    "color": non-null UInt32
    "colormap": non-null UInt8
)
```
